title: `insert on duplicate` with global index report `key not exists`
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
create table t(a int, b int, unique index idx(a)) partition by hash(b) partitions 5;
```
Run SQL below
```
insert into t values (1, 1), (1, 2) on duplicate key update a=1, b=3;
```
Or
```
insert into t values (1, 1);
insert into t values (1, 2) on duplicate key update a=1, b=3;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

no error

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

report `ERROR 8021 (HY000): Error: key not exist`

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT, UNIQUE (a));
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES (1, 1), (1, 2) ON CONFLICT (a) DO UPDATE SET b = 3;
CREATE TABLE t2(c VARCHAR(10), d INT, UNIQUE (c));
INSERT INTO t2(c, d) VALUES ('test', 5), ('test', 15) ON CONFLICT (c) DO UPDATE SET d = d + 1;
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES (NULL, 3) ON CONFLICT (a) DO UPDATE SET a = COALESCE(t1.a, 0);
key_bug_features: insert on duplicate key with global index
